jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at NTPC
jsonLd.description:
NTPC is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NTPC:
NTPC is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NTPC!
